reviews.review_title: Hell yeah this is a work out!
Don't play with battery saver on!
reviews.review_description:
Edit: left eye no longer blacked out. 5 stars!

I couldn't figure out why my left vision was completely blocked.  Then I remembered other games/apps had issues with Meta's battery saver setting.  Disabling it fixed the issue.

Haven't played it much since figuring out how to restore full vision but looks decent so far so giving it 4 stars for now :)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the updated review - I appreciate it!
It was a lot of late nights getting to the bottom of that bug.

reviews.review_description: This game was a real surprise, way better than I thought it would be! It's a simple concept, but it's executed just perfectly. You don't need any tutorial to play since the design of the bombs themselves tells you what you need to know. That's brilliant! Some need to be punched from a certain direction, some are to be avoided, others require a specific hand. So there's lots of variety and it's quite the workout. It's the boxing version of Fruit Ninja VR, but personally I find this way more fun.

If you like a good workout, you should definitely try Punch bomb. It has 3 different modes. Do your best and your name will appear on the leaderboard.

You can also see how many punches you have already given, your own statistics.

Smash the bombs before they explode.

Avoid the bombs with spikes and the lasers. Better, just smash them with a regular bomb.

I like those achievements in the meta app.

Punch Bomb brings a revolutionary concept to VR fitness with its 360-degree arena and diverse gameplay modes. It's not just a workout — it’s a full mental and physical challenge cleverly disguised as pure fun.

The visuals are clean and stylish, and the game feels incredibly polished even at launch. What truly surprised me was how addictive it is — I spent over an hour trying to beat my friend’s high score just so I could brag about it! 🎯

Each mode targets something different: full-body movement, reflexes, accuracy, or even cognitive challenges. There's truly something for everyone — from intense sessions to casual play.

And yes, the unlockables are brilliant. I can’t get over the duck gloves that actually quack when you land a hit. 🦆😂

The game already feels content-rich, and with more updates planned based on community feedback, this is one to watch closely. If you're looking for a fun, fresh, and funny way to stay active in VR — Punch Bomb delivers.
